title: AvM Minecraft mod
description: this mod adds some various things from the Alan Becker universe such as the King staff or the virabands
body:
-----------
**RECIPES**
-----------

Staff handler

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4e6893ec68237524a94acb3420dcffdd7337b3e.png)

Empty staff

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ab927b82249b29badccf363c277dee9b89e9596.png)

Command block

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d75fa0670183118e7870755efabc262df1c8044.png)

---------
**GUIDE**
---------

to put a block in the staff, you need to right click the block with the empty staff, but since in survival you can't put command blocks in the ground to obtain that staff you just need to have the empty staff in the main hand and the command block in the other, then, just right click.
if you want to take out a block from a staff just right click it and the item will drop in the ground, except for the command block.

If you have TNT in one hand and fint and steel in the other, you can right click to shoot fused TNT where you are facing, you can also do this with a dispenser and arrows, but it only work with normal arrows.

-----------------------
**COMMAND BLOCK STAFF**
-----------------------

This is the best of the four staffs cause pressing R (changable key binding in settings) a menu to select an hability will show. Each of the habilities do something different, all of them based in the commands that King orange use from the Alan Becker video AVM 25 "the ultimate weapon"
to select one you only need to click it and it will automatically be in your inventory.
The first one puts blocks where you are facing, the second shoot arrows and fireballs just like in that episode, the third strikes lightnings where you aim and the last one propels you in the direction you are looking (this one have 3s cooldown cause otherways cou could just fly).

Once you have selected the hability just hold right click and see the magic.
in the menu to select the hability there's a empty space in the right, thats because im out of ideas but im going to fill it in an update.

---------------
**VIRA-BAND**
---------------

The vira-band is obtainable in the house of The Dark Lord, which is a structure with it inside.
Handling it will give you some effect boost like in the series, these are: speed, streinght, regeneration and also glowing, so players know you have the vira-band.
If you right click the vira-band you will shoot a viraspike, if it hits someone it deals lots of damage and a new effect called "decoding" which deal passive damage, slows you down, makes you hungry and don't let you put blocks. You can shoot them with cooldown.

-----------
**CREDITS**
-----------

I made this mod by my own using MCreator, also the 3d models are mine and created in blockbench but the main idea of this mod and the 3d models had been hardly inspirated by Alan Becker so go check his youtube channel and watch some of his amazing videos.
[https://www.youtube.com/@alanbecker/videos](https://www.youtube.com/@alanbecker/videos)
